_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v4 complete: all 7 games strong coverage. No more zero-tier gap. othello 541, hex 452, clobber 469. 100% think blocks, win-only, diverse strategic reasoning.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-20: v4 batch3 merged. 3687→4657 (+970). All 7 games well-represented. HF synced.

NAVWORLD.notes: D12: +230 Claude Sonnet batch2 (intercity 50, multiday 50, hybrid 50, business 50, food_tour 30). All QQR >=25. Total Claude = 341.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: REPLACING SWE-SYNTH. Pipeline mines GitHub PRs → Docker build → test validation → training trajectories. Old 983 SWE-SYNTH entries deprecated.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-20: Transition initiated. Pipeline exists at repos/affine-swe-infinite/. No new data generated yet.

LIVEWEB.notes: 356 DDB + 14 Claude Sonnet distill (score>0, coingecko+stooq). prepare-data uses _normalize_tool_calls_qwen3() for correct Qwen3 format. More plugins pending (proxy key expired).
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-20: +14 Claude distill entries merged (12 score=1.0, 2 partial). HF synced.
